_meta.description: Average monthly bill benchmarks for Agent Richy's cost comparison analysis
_meta.note: Based on US national averages as of early 2026. All values are monthly in USD.

internet.tip: Call retention department. Mention competitor prices. Best time: when your contract is expiring.

cell_phone.tip: MVNOs like Mint Mobile, Visible, and Cricket offer the same networks for 50-70% less.

car_insurance.tip: Shop annually. Bundle home+auto. Ask about safe driver, low mileage, and payment-in-full discounts.

electric.tip: Switch to LED bulbs, use a smart thermostat, and check if your provider offers off-peak rates.

water.tip: Fix leaks immediately. A running toilet can waste $100+/month.

renters_insurance.tip: Bundle with auto insurance. Raise deductible to $1000. Install a deadbolt for discounts.

gym.tip: Negotiate in late January (post-resolution rush) or August. Ask about corporate rates even if freelance.
